1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get quick-clay polygons within Lillestrøm extent (reduced by municipality bbox)

3.description: get parcels (teig) in Lillestrøm by kommunenummer

4.description: get 1km grid cells intersecting Lillestrøm extent

5.description: find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending
